title: Clinical and molecular analysis in a cohort of Chinese children with Cornelia de Lange syndrome.
author: Li Q Chang G Yin L Li J Huang X Shen Y Li G Xu Y Wang J Wang X
content: S-EPMC7718889 PMC7718889 Clinical and molecular analysis in a cohort of Chinese children with Cornelia de Lange syndrome.
